DROP_ANYWHERE.label: Allow drag & drop anywhere on the page
DROP_ANYWHERE.hint: Default: off (only when dropping on the search bar)

USE_CACHE.label: Cache tracks for quicker lookups in the future
USE_CACHE.hint: Default: on (a cache entry is retained for 30 days at most)

OPEN_IN_NEW_TAB.label: Open YouTube search in a new tab
OPEN_IN_NEW_TAB.hint: Default: off (hold Shift while pasting or dropping to temporarily enable)

PREFER_SMOOTH_SEARCH.label: Prefer a smoother searching experience
PREFER_SMOOTH_SEARCH.hint: Default: on (some users may experience this as a slower search)

TOAST_DURATION.label: Error notification duration
TOAST_DURATION.hint: How long error messages stay visible before auto-dismissing
